title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 11 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 11 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 11 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/12/2025
Iron ore futures on the Dalian Exchange traded sideways in the morning session today. Influenced by market news, prices saw a sharpdecline in the afternoon. The main contract I2605 ultimately closed at 757, down 1.3% from the previous trading day.
